pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Read-only primary GitHub screening covered recent open explicit bounty/funding results plus current Tenstorrent and Expensify bounty queues. Credible Tenstorrent candidates #50522 and #50612 are assigned and have linked implementation PR activity; older Tenstorrent items were stale or crowded. Monk-plugin bug reports are security-style reports with no verifiable payment terms and sign-up/install prerequisites. Current Expensify $250 issues had 6-44+ comments or a due-for-payment status, so none met the low-competition/current-work gate. Searches for MaartenAudenaert2 found no issue or PR in the Monk or Tenstorrent candidate repos.

Live read-only list returned 19 open tasks. The only professional software integration task was re-fetched with task get, pitches, and submissions: it has two distinct pending pitches, no submissions, an escrowed 1.999999-USDC net reward, and a mandatory 0.001-USDC pitch cost. Remaining tasks were creative-media work, sponsorship/referral work, paid x402/signing tasks, or had 14-354 submissions.

rejected.reason: Solved: linked PR #95875 was merged on 2026-07-20; issue title says payment is due 2026-07-29.

Already assigned to ajumpa and an open draft implementation PR #50680 was posted at 2026-07-22T05:30:25Z. The $2,000 payout requires all three hardware bring-up stages; it is not session-sized or low competition.

Live task get plus pitches/submissions recheck: open pitch task, escrowed net reward 1.999999 USDC, no submissions, and two pending pitches by two distinct worker addresses. Submitting a pitch costs 0.001 USDC, so it is not free to start; selection and payment also require a third-party maintainer to merge the integration.

Not low-competition: five visible independent claim comments (2026-07-16 through 2026-07-21) and open PR #85 explicitly fixes #72. The task remains open but the GrantFox payment terms are not fully specified in the primary issue.

Already being implemented: open PR #18 explicitly closes #10, and six visible claim/implementation comments exist. Issue states a $25 USDC GrantFox/Stellar Foundation campaign reward, but it is no longer low-competition.

Fresh security-style bug report, not a normal implementation bounty. The primary issue specifies no amount, payer, payout method, trigger, deadline, or submission route; it also requires a monk.io sign-up and product installation. Repository activity is real, but the current bounty promise is unverified and the required account/product actions are out of scope for read-only screening.

Official $1,500 Tenstorrent bounty, but maintainer jberkowitzTT states it was reviewed and assigned to sreeshanth-soma. A separate ModernBERT PR #50635 was opened then closed. The all-three-stage hardware bring-up has no session-sized path; payout is only after all stages and subject to program terms/tax requirements.

Official $10,000 Tenstorrent bounty is already assigned to jasondavies. The maintainer confirms assignment, and open PR #50624 explicitly closes the issue with implemented hardware benchmarks; it is not available for a competing submission.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
